'''Isolde Siro''' was a purple-haired [[Human/Legends|Human]] female fringe criminal.

==Biography==
Recruited into [[Lando's Commandos]], Siro opposed the use of [[Air Marshal]] [[Von Asch]] in their mission to stop the [[Eiattu pirates|TIE Pirates]]. In the ambush sprung by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kine (pirate)|Kine]], Asch took a lightsaber bolt meant for Siro, who in turn killed Kine.

Asch survived the blast, and expressed his belief that Siro was to play an important role in the future.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|5|Lando's Commandos: On Eagles' Wings}} {{1st}}
